name: harness-mcp-server
description: Connect AI agents to Harness for CI/CD, code repositories, pull requests, services, environments, and feature flags.
long_description: The Harness MCP Server gives MCP-compatible clients access to Harness platform workflows through consolidated tools, resources, and prompts. It supports local stdio usage and can be bundled as a Node-based MCPB extension.

HARNESS_API_KEY.title: Harness API Key
HARNESS_API_KEY.description: Personal access token or service account token used to authenticate with Harness.

HARNESS_FME_API_KEY.title: FME/Split Admin Credential
HARNESS_FME_API_KEY.description: Optional single-user/self-hosted FME/Split Admin credential for fme_ resources. This can be a legacy Split admin key or an FME-entitled Harness PAT/SAT. Do not set this for multi-user deployments.

HARNESS_FME_BASE_URL.title: FME/Split Base URL
HARNESS_FME_BASE_URL.description: Optional Split/FME Admin API base URL used by fme_ resources. Defaults to https://api.split.io.

HARNESS_ACCOUNT_ID.title: Harness Account ID
HARNESS_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Harness account identifier. Optional when using a PAT or SAT because the server can extract the account ID from pat.<accountId>.<tokenId>.<secret> or sat.<accountId>.<tokenId>.<secret>.

HARNESS_ORG.title: Default Harness Organization
HARNESS_ORG.description: Default Harness organization identifier. If omitted, org_id must be provided per tool call.

HARNESS_PROJECT.title: Default Harness Project
HARNESS_PROJECT.description: Default Harness project identifier for project-scoped operations.

HARNESS_BASE_URL.title: Harness Base URL
HARNESS_BASE_URL.description: Harness API/UI base URL for this local MCP server. Use the default for public Harness SaaS; set a private SaaS or self-managed host such as https://harness0.harness.io when needed.

MCP_SESSION_TTL_MS.title: HTTP Session TTL (ms)
MCP_SESSION_TTL_MS.description: Idle HTTP session lifetime in milliseconds. Sessions are not considered idle while a request or SSE stream is active.
